1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Cast cleric spells using Wisdom. Prepare WIS mod + Cleric level spells per long rest from the entire cleric spell list.

1.name: Divine Domain
1.description: Choose a domain subclass: Life, Light, Trickery, War, Knowledge, Nature, Tempest, Death, Grave, Order, Peace, Twilight, or others.

2.name: Channel Divinity
2.description: Once per short rest, channel divine energy for your domain's Channel Divinity option or Turn Undead.

2.name: Turn Undead
2.description: Channel Divinity: each undead within 30 ft must make a WIS save or be turned for 1 minute.

5.name: Destroy Undead
5.description: Undead of CR 1/2 or lower instantly destroyed when turned. CR threshold increases at higher levels.

10.name: Divine Intervention
10.description: Implore your deity for aid. Roll d100 ≤ Cleric level to succeed. Guaranteed success at level 20.
